founder.name: Ren Ito
founder.bio: Second-time founder. Shimmer (2016-2019) shut down; applying distribution lessons at Vectorly.

company.name: Vectorly
company.one_liner: Managed vector database with sub-10ms recall at billion-scale, tuned for RAG workloads.

content.title: Show HN: Vectorly - billion-scale vector search in Rust
content.author: renito

content.note: Closed a $2.5M seed led by a Tokyo fund. 18 paying customers, distribution via an OSS-to-cloud funnel Ren built deliberately this time.
